final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-form video vertical cover for the 8k GGU gaming monitor launch, designed for Douyin/Kuaishou platform with minimalist premium aesthetic and bold typography.

Style/medium: minimalist premium tech poster design with the geometric restraint of Dieter Rams industrial philosophy, engineered for thumb-stopping clarity
Composition: rule-of-thirds grid, large headline occupying the upper two-thirds as visual anchor, product or abstract visual element grounding the lower third, generous breathing room around all elements
Subject: 8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz as the hero headline, secondary line "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" positioned below with clear hierarchy
Scene/backdrop: pure or near-pure field with subtle gradient or single geometric accent, the silence of confidence
Lighting/mood: clean studio precision, the quiet authority of premium industrial design
Color palette: neutral graphite and cool slate with one disciplined accent (deep electric blue or warm amber) for the headline, the tension between restraint and energy
Materials/textures: matte surface with crisp typographic edges, the honesty of precision manufacturing
Text (verbatim): 8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz
Constraints: headline must dominate at thumbnail scale, all text legible on mobile screens, vertical 9:16 format optimized for short-video feeds
Avoid: visual clutter, multiple competing colors, decorative gradients, 8K/stuffer quality words, busy backgrounds that fight the text
